name: Rum Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and half and half in a pan over very low heat. Remove from heat.
2. Add eggs, butter, and rum to the melted mixture. Blend until thick.
3. Refrigerate the mixture until cool.
4. Form small balls (approximately 3/4 inch) and toss with powdered chocolate (not cocoa).
5. Store in airtight containers; they freeze well.
